data.title: SEC Acknowledges CoinShares XRP and Litecoin ETF Filings
data.description:
The SEC has acknowledged filings from CoinShares to list XRP and Litecoin ETFs, according to a Wednesday filing.
source: https://decrypt.co/306792/sec-coinshares-xrp-litecoin-etf-filings

data.title: Nigerian authorities seeking a $79.5B penalty against Binance
data.description:
Nigeria’s federal government has sued Binance for a $79.5B penalty. The government demands $2B in back taxes for 2022-2023. Binance is accused of tax evasion and operating without a license. In an unprecedented escalation of legal confrontations, Nigeria’s federal government has launched a new lawsuit against the cryptocurrency giant, Binance, demanding a staggering $79.5 billion […]
The post...
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/nigerian-authorities-seeking-a-79-5b-penalty-against-binance/

data.title: David Marcus on building Bitcoin’s global payment network with Lightspark
data.description:

data.title: US SEC acknowledges CoinShares filing for Litecoin ETF
data.description:
The US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) moved the Litecoin ETF a step closer, after posting an acknowledgement for a rule change to list the CoinShares investment product on Nasdaq.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-sec-acknowledges-coinshares-filing-for-litecoin-etf/

data.title: Bitcoin Pepe’s presale hits $2.77M as survey shows memecoins’ rewards outweigh risks
data.description:
Bitcoin Pepe presale hits $2.77M as momentum builds. Enthusiasts believe the LIBRA scandal calls for clearer memecoin regulation. Kraken survey shows 76% of investors see memecoin rewards outweighing risks. Bitcoin Pepe, heralded as the world’s only Bitcoin Meme ICO, has made headlines by raising $2.77 million out of its $2.85 million presale target in its […]

source: https://coinjournal.net/news/bitcoin-pepes-presale-hits-2-77m-as-survey-shows-memecoins-rewards-outweigh-risks/
